== Demon Chan-hee ♀ ==
Half of her body has been biochemically modified. Now she is set free from the Demon Gods.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Demon Chan-hee, first intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No.18]] and then fully defeat Chan-hee 1/2.
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy
!ATK
!DEF 
!HP
!Special Sats
!Weakness
!Rewards
|-
| rowspan="3" |Chan-hee 1/2
|51,737
|38,962
|1,160,891 
|HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|TECH 14,240
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Feast Ticket}} +50, {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}} +50 
|-
|80,385
|60,536 
|2,313,387
|HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|TECH 18,240
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Feast Ticket}} +50, {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}} +50 
|-
|117,584
|88,550
|4,136,057
|HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|TECH 22,330
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Feast Ticket}} +100, {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}} +100
|}

===☆☆☆ > ★★★===
After 2 letters back and forth, Demon Chan-hee will move in permanently with her minion, Demonic Tentacle.

==Rent==
Demon Chan-hee rent is collected on '''Saturday''' and appears as a small organ on the left side of the floor.

[[File:Demon Chan-hee rent.png|left]]
 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Mutated Tentacle|purple}}

{{Clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Organ Chests!
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward 
|-
|★
|Organ Chest +10
|-
|★★
|Organ Chest +10
|-
|★★★
|Organ Chest +10
|-
|★★★★
|Organ Chest +20
|-
|★★★★★
|Organ Chest +30
|-
|★★★★★★
|Organ Chest +40
|}<br>

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
! style="background-color:var(--blue-text);" |{{Reimg|Eye of Medusa}}<br>[[Eye of Medusa]]
! style="background-color:var(--blue-text);" |{{Reimg|Tee Virus}}<br>[[Tee Virus]]
! style="background-color:var(--purple-text);" |{{Reimg|Supersoldier Serum}}<br>[[Supersoldier Serum]]
! style="background-color:var(--purple-text);" |{{Reimg|Gene Map}}<br>[[Gene Map]]
|-
! style="background-color:var(--orange-text);" |{{Reimg|Gaea's Hand}}<br>[[Gaea's Hand]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-text);" |{{Reimg|Phoenix Feather}}<br>[[Phoenix Feather]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-text);" |{{Reimg|Blood of Cain}}<br>[[Blood of Cain]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-text);" |{{Reimg|Double Helix DNA}}<br>[[Double Helix DNA]]
|}

==Demon Chan-hee's Tentacles==
When Demon Chan-hee was still a Hitman, Demon Gods gave her a biological weapon with regenerative powers!
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''Research Skill Required'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!!'''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| || ||FAME +5||In Gene Simulations, DMG +0.5%
|-
|2||180||2,000||FAME +10||In Gene Simulations, DMG +1%
|-
|3||190||4,500||FAME +15||In Gene Simulations, DMG +1.5%
|-
|4||200||8,000||FAME +20||In Gene Simulations, DMG +2%
|-
|5||210||12,500||FAME +25||In Gene Simulations, DMG +2.5%
|-
|6||220||18,000||FAME +30||In Gene Simulations, DMG +3%
|-
|7||230||24,500||FAME +35||In Gene Simulations, DMG +3.5%
|-
|8||240||32,000||FAME +40||In Gene Simulations, DMG +4%
|-
|9||250||40,500||FAME +45||In Gene Simulations, DMG +4.5%
|-
|10||260||50,000||FAME +50||In Gene Simulations, DMG +5%
|-
|11||270||60,500||FAME +55||In Gene Simulations, DMG +5.5%
|-
|12||285||72,000||FAME +60||In Gene Simulations, DMG +6%
|-
|13||300||84,500||FAME +65||In Gene Simulations, DMG +6.5%
|-
|14||315||98,000||FAME +70||In Gene Simulations, DMG +7%
|-
|15||330||112,000||FAME +75||In Gene Simulations, DMG +7.5%
|-
|16||345||123,000||FAME +80||In Gene Simulations, DMG +8%
|-
|17||360||144,000||FAME +85||In Gene Simulations, DMG +8.5%
|-
|18||375||162,000||FAME +90||In Gene Simulations, DMG +9%
|-
|19||390||180,000||FAME +95||In Gene Simulations, DMG +9.5%
|-
|20||400||200,000||FAME +100||In Gene Simulations, DMG +10%
|-
|21||420||220,000||FAME +105||In Gene Simulations, DMG +10.5%
|-
|22||440||242,000||FAME +110||In Gene Simulations, DMG +11%
|-
|23||460||264,000||FAME +115||In Gene Simulations, DMG +11.5%
|-
|24||480||285,000||FAME +120||In Gene Simulations, DMG +12%
|-
|25||500||309,000||FAME +125||In Gene Simulations, DMG +12.5%
|-
|26||520||333,000||FAME +130||In Gene Simulations, DMG +13%
|-
|27||540||357,000||FAME +135||In Gene Simulations, DMG +13.5%
|-
|28||560||381,000||FAME +140||In Gene Simulations, DMG +14%
|-
|29||580||405,000||FAME +145||In Gene Simulations, DMG +14.5%
|-
|30||600||429,000||FAME +150||In Gene Simulations, DMG +15%
|}

== Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Demon Chan-hee's Tentacles is. 
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!! '''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| ||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +10 
|-
|2||4000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|-
|3||6000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +30
|-
|4||8000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +40
|-
|5||10000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +50
|-
|6||12000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +60
|-
|7||14000||Mutant Minion MAX +1 ||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +70
|-
|8||16000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +80 
|-
|9||18000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +90
|-
|10||20000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +100
|-
|11||22000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +110
|-
|12||24000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +120
|-
|13||26000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +130
|-
|14||28000||Mutant Minion MAX +1 ||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +140
|-
|15||30000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +150
|-
|16||32000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|-
|17||34000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +170
|-
|18||36000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +180
|-
|19||38000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +190
|-
|20||40000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +200
|-
|21||42000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +210
|-
|22||44000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +220
|-
|23||46000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +230
|-
|24||48000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +240
|-
|25||50000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +250
|-
|26||55000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +260
|-
|27||60000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +270
|-
|28||65000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +280
|-
|29||70000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +290
|-
|30||75000||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop RUSH +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Demon Chan-hee specializes in '''Mutant Genes''' specialization and therefore the research manual cost for the Mutant is halved. 

{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Lv.!!Manuals Required!!Lv.!!Manuals Required
|-
|'''1-10'''||1||'''11-20'''||2
|-
|'''21-30'''||3||'''31-40'''||4
|-
|'''41-50'''||5||'''51-60'''||10
|-
|'''61-70'''||20||'''71-80'''||40
|-
|'''81-90'''||60||'''91-95'''||80
|-
|'''96'''||100 ||'''97'''||200
|-
|'''98'''||400|| '''99'''||600
|-
|'''100''' || 800
|}

==Minion - Demonic Tentacle==
The Demon God took half of Chan-hee's body and combined it with a demon to revive her. These tentacles are now a symbol of Demon Chan-hee...

===Special Ability - Whiplash ===
Per 10 Demonic Tentacles in battle, Troop ATK +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Demonic Tentacles!
{| class="wikitable"
!'''Name'''
!'''1-Star'''
!'''2-Star'''
!'''3-Star''' 
!'''4-Star''' 
!'''5-Star'''
!'''6-Star'''
|-
|{{Relink|Gregor Specimen|blue}}
|Demonic Tentacle HP +1%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +1%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +1%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|{{Relink|Tee Virus|blue}}
|Demonic Tentacle HP +1%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +1%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +1%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|{{Relink|Socrates' Poison|purple}}
|Demonic Tentacle HP +2%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +2% 
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +2%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +2%
|Demonic Tentacle All Stats +3%
|
|-
|{{Relink|Supersoldier Serum|purple}}
|Demonic Tentacle HP +2%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +2%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +2%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +2%
|Demonic Tentacle All Stats +3%
|
|-
|{{Relink|Ape's Footprint Fossil|orange}}
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|Demonic Tentacle RUSH +4%
|-
|{{Relink|Element R.|orange}}
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|Demonic Tentacle DEF +4%
|-
|{{Relink|Golden Scarab|orange}}
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|Demonic Tentacle HP +4%
|-
|{{Relink|Einstein's Brain|orange}}
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|Demonic Tentacle ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
